@ sum-12-12:
@@ div-cancel-double:
(((12 + 12) * 2) / 2)
(((12 + 12) / 2) * 2)
((12 + 12) * (2 / 2))
((12 + 12) / (2 / 2))
((2 * (12 + 12)) / 2)
(2 / (2 / (12 + 12)))
((2 / 2) * (12 + 12))
(2 * ((12 + 12) / 2))

@@ sub-cancel:
(((12 + 12) + 2) - 2)
(((12 + 12) - 2) + 2)
((12 + 12) + (2 - 2))
((12 + 12) - (2 - 2))
((12 + (12 + 2)) - 2)
(12 + ((12 + 2) - 2))
((12 + (12 - 2)) + 2)
(12 + ((12 - 2) + 2))
(12 + (12 + (2 - 2)))
(12 + (12 - (2 - 2)))
(((12 + 2) + 12) - 2)
((12 + 2) + (12 - 2))
(((12 + 2) - 2) + 12)
((12 + 2) - (2 - 12))
(((12 - 2) + 12) + 2)
((12 - 2) + (12 + 2))
(((12 - 2) + 2) + 12)
((12 - 2) + (2 + 12))
((12 + (2 + 12)) - 2)
(12 + ((2 + 12) - 2))
((12 - (2 - 12)) + 2)
(12 - ((2 - 12) - 2))
(12 - (2 - (12 + 2)))
(12 + (2 + (12 - 2)))
((12 + (2 - 2)) + 12)
((12 - (2 - 2)) + 12)
(12 + ((2 - 2) + 12))
(12 - ((2 - 2) - 12))
(12 - (2 - (2 + 12)))
(12 + (2 - (2 - 12)))
(((2 + 12) + 12) - 2)
((2 + 12) + (12 - 2))
(((2 + 12) - 2) + 12)
((2 + 12) - (2 - 12))
((2 + (12 + 12)) - 2)
(2 + ((12 + 12) - 2))
(2 - (2 - (12 + 12)))
((2 - (2 - 12)) + 12)
(2 - ((2 - 12) - 12))
(2 + (12 - (2 - 12)))
(2 + (12 + (12 - 2)))
((2 + (12 - 2)) + 12)
(2 + ((12 - 2) + 12))
(((2 - 2) + 12) + 12)
((2 - 2) + (12 + 12))

@@ div-cancel-single:
(12 + ((12 * 2) / 2))
(12 + ((12 / 2) * 2))
(12 + (12 * (2 / 2)))
(12 + (12 / (2 / 2)))
(((12 * 2) / 2) + 12)
(((12 / 2) * 2) + 12)
(12 + ((2 * 12) / 2))
(12 + (2 * (12 / 2)))
((12 * (2 / 2)) + 12)
((12 / (2 / 2)) + 12)
(12 + ((2 / 2) * 12))
(12 + (2 / (2 / 12)))
(((2 * 12) / 2) + 12)
((2 * (12 / 2)) + 12)
(((2 / 2) * 12) + 12)
((2 / (2 / 12)) + 12)

@ sub-24-12-prod-2:
(((12 * 2) - 12) * 2)
(((2 * 12) - 12) * 2)
(2 * ((12 * 2) - 12))
(2 * ((2 * 12) - 12))
